parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-6', max_tokens: 600, system: 'You are an outbound sales copywriter for Crossmint — enterprise Web3 infrastructure for wallets, stablecoins, and agentic payments. Write concise, personalized first-touch emails under 150 words. Return ONLY valid JSON: {"subject": "...", "body": "..."}', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Write a personalized first-touch email for ' + $json.personName + ' (' + $json.personTitle + ') at ' + $json.companyName + ' in the ' + $json.companyIndustry + ' space. Country: ' + $json.country + '. Angle: Crossmint stablecoin infrastructure and wallet APIs can accelerate their product without rebuilding core Web3 infrastructure.' }] }) }}

parameters.name: text
